title: Cryptic Creatures
description: Are you a fan of spooky things?  If so, then this datapack is for you! It adds in all the classic spooks to your Minecraft world.  Great haunts, such as Herobrine, Entity 303, and Null!  I hope you guys enjoy the pack :D
body:
## Info:
This pack adds in a bunch of new features, and spooky events.  It also adds in a new Sanity system!  I must admit that this pack was a bit rushed, so apologies in advance for any underwhelming features.  However, I still found it quite fun to make and play, And I hope that you do too :D
### New Features:
﻿-3 new spooky entities
-Random events that mysteriously occur
-Sanity!!!
### What to look out for:
﻿﻿-A special item in dungeons
-Weird text?
-Weird structures
